title: Dorma's Cafe
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dorma's Cafe''' was a dining establishment run by a [[Gender/Legends|woman]] named [[Dorma]] during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. It was located in the [[Cloud Lake]] District of [[Ussa]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Bellassa/Legends|Bellassa]]. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] took over the planet after the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the cafe fell on hard times as foot traffic thinned out and neighboring businesses closed.

The cafe was located next to the [[Olin and Lands]] agency and across the street from [[Mariana's Exquisite Designs and Alterations]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: The Desperate Mission]]'' {{1st}}
